system.description: Without the Orthodoxy's containment frameworks, the Iron Blessed's formations discharge freely. All enemies within 20 feet take 7 + RESONANCE damage and receive Stagger. Enemies at or below half HP instead receive Stagger and Expose 3. The Iron Blessed takes 3 damage from the uncontrolled discharge — their own formations turn against them briefly. After this card resolves, the Iron Blessed's next card this turn costs 0 AP, as the discharge has temporarily cleared their resonance channels. This card cannot be Overclocked.
